feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CUSTOMER CHECKOUT MANAGER ARTICLES UPDATE FROM SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using SAP Customer Checkout Version CCO_2.0_FP13_SP05 with SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.191) FP 2202 as backend system.

The synchronisation of items from B1 to CCO is ok, but when we check the sales reports in SAP Customer Checkout Manager there are incoherences between items codes and name for example in the report we have item 'A0001' with description 'A' but in SAP B1 item 'A0001' have description 'B'.

So we checked the "articles" tiles in SAP Customer Checkout Manager the total of items is not the same as SAP B1 and some items have not the right description.

My question is where do the items in SAP Customer Checkout Manager are from ? and is it possible to update them in mass to match the items in SAP B1 ?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Formatted Search PO Screen
entry.content:
I have a UDF on OCRD called "U_Print_Rev"

I need to pull this field to the same UDF on the purchase order screen matching OCRD.CardCode to OPOR.CardCode

I am having problems with the formatted search, it doesnt seem to be executing or I have something wrong.

Can someone help, I would appreciate it

entry.title: B1 Asset Revaluation No matching records found
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Error No matching records found is encountered when posting an Asset Revaluation. 

To replicate issue, post an asset revaluation for Derived Area - successful. Then post another asset revaluation for main area - with error.

Can you please advise? Thank you.

entry.title: No me aparece en ningún documento mi precio guardado en DMA.
entry.content: Al entrar a datos maestros del artículo, le pongo precio a uno en particular, pero al hacer una orden de venta del mismo no me estira el precio guardado previamente. Pasa lo mismo cuando creo un descuento específico por cliente, el mismo no me estira. Queda en cero al crear nuevos documentos.

entry.title: What is the ItemCodes in warehouse cotaion BIN code?
entry.content:
Hi,

I use SAP B1 with MS SQL server

I need to see which Item Codes consist in warehouse BIN locations via SQL code?

Regards

entry.title: Could not split statements; SQL console content is too large
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What is the issue and how to resolve it?

Error: Could not split statements; SQL console content is too large

Error Description:
Statement 'alter PROCEDURE SBO_SP_TransactionNotification ( in object_type nvarchar(30), -- SBO Object Type in ...'
successfully executed in 203 ms 183 µs (server processing time: 201 ms 195 µs) - Rows Affected: 0

@SapB1 @hanastudio @transaction_notification

entry.title: Inquiry on Rounding Tax Field in AR Invoice (SAP Business One)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I would like to inquire if there is any possibility of rounding the Tax field in the AR invoice window in SAP Business One. Currently, the system uses 3 decimal places, but my aim is to round this to 2 decimal places.

Could you please advise on whether this adjustment is possible, and if so, the steps required to implement it? If you need any further clarification, please feel free to let me know.

entry.title: Cancel A/R Invoice
entry.content:
Hi to all,

We created a delivery and then billed for it, but we didn't bill for the transportation that was included in the delivery. We then manually closed the delivery so that it could no longer be used.
Now, we realized that we had used the wrong exchange rate.
I tried to cancel the A/R Invoice but I get the error “Cancellation is not possible; base documents closed by users”

Is there any solution to cancel the document or do I just have to make a credit memo?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Query with Last Invoice Date
entry.content:
I am looking to create a report showing

All suppliers

Payment Terms

Current Account Balance

Last purchase invoice date

I can get all fields correct apart from the date of that suppliers last invoice date.

Can anyone assist please?

entry.title: Internal error (3998) occurred [Message 131-183] when adding document in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,

We update a test company we had for SAP B1 v10 with a backup of the live one so we could use it as a sandbox for some things we wanted to test but when trying to create documents in this test company (sales orders, business partners, warehouses etc) we are getting the error: Internal error (3998) occurred [Message 131-183].

After restoring the database we performed the "refresh database user" in the SLD. That database user seems to have all the correct permissions the the SQL server, as compared with the users of other databases.

Any ideas as to what might be causing this?

Thank you.

Spyros

entry.title: SAP CAL Appliance Activation for Business One 10 on GCP GCP-SAP B1 CAL Appliance Activation issue
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, and want to run SAP Business One Hana on Google Cloud using SAP CAL. 

I could setup Trial GCP account. Also create SAP B1 Appliance in the console https://cal.sap.com/console Using documentation guideline https://help.sap.com/doc/aafe85d6161942d794af0adfee96fbac/10.0/en-US/SAP_Business_One_on_SAP_CAL.pdf 

Appliance got prepared in SAP console and shows the VM config. Whistle trying to activate it, it gives following error: 

“

Failed Operation

Start

On Step

Check Quotas

Cloud Provider

Google Cloud Platform

Message

Usage limits reached:

Regional:

- Quota 'N2_CPUS' exceeded. Available: 8, Requested: 20

 

To solve this problem you have to request additional quota from the Quotas page in the GCP console.

 

=

 

Note, no VM was created in GCP during the process. As there is no VM in GCP but only in SAP CAL console, so how can I increase N2_CPUS value in GCP?

Can someone help me here to getting me SAP B1 to run successfully using GCP trial / free account? 

Highly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Business One Cloud Account Subscription
entry.content: Dear SAP Community. I'm new to SAP learning and need SAP Business One Ver 10 VM access for about 2 months for my self learning. Hope someone here can help me with. I'm ready to subscribe. Or can possibly assist me on Zoom with Activating my SAP B1 Appliance in SAP CAL to work with GCP Trial account. Thanks so much.

entry.title: How do you batch-delete line items from a Sales or Template Bill of Material within SAP B1?
entry.content:
We have many sales and template Bill of Materials that we maintain.

The question has come up - how do you batch-delete line items from a Sales or Template Bill of Materials for products in which are out of stock and are discontinued?

We have BOYUM and I use Master Data Manager for a few different things and I was hoping that I could use this as well for this circumstance - but I'm not sure that you can?

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP B1 Installation - System Landscape Directory no responding
entry.content:
SAP Business One

Hello SAP Experts,

When I click “Next” at this stage, the setup stops responding.

I’m wondering what might be causing this issue.

I have already installed it once and had a little problem to installed components so I uninstalled and install it again then the problem show up, I guess there might be something wrong. However, I couldn’t find the problem. I would appreciate it if anyone has faced this problem before and knows how to fix it. Thanks.

Win11(HOME), Microsoft SQL Server 2019 (RTM) - 15.0.2000.5 (X64),SAP B1 10.00.250 FP 2405

Best regards,

entry.title: Dear SAP Community i need a validation for restricted an warehouse for same SAP users
entry.content: Dear SAP Community i need a validation for restricted an warehouse for my same SAP b1 users please provide me stored procedures for the same..

entry.title: Add new folder tabs to BP form - B1 crashed when I close this form
entry.content:
Hi,

One folder tab has been created in the BP Master screen along with a grid using add-on.

 

Steps

1. Selecting One customer .

2. Going to newly created tab.

3. Clicking refresh menu .

4. Clicking OK button in BP master will close SAP B1.

SA B1 Version : SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.200) FP 2208 (64-bit)

entry.title: How to check the actual consume memory of the Company DB on SBO
entry.content:
Hi There, I have a performance issue on my SAP Business One 10.0 for MSSQL. I suppose it might be a Memory issue.

And I know this document give the suggest / plan hardware requirements Hardware Requirements Guide for SAP Business One(PDF)

But I need the ACTUAL consume memory of MSSQL server.

Where can I find the tool to figure out the actual consume memory of MSSQL server?

And I can see which DB, which table consume the largest memory?

BR

Robin

entry.title: SAP Business One Client install on Azure Remote Desktop
entry.content:
Hi, we are testing at the moment so trying to find out the issues before we go live. We have migrated our SAP B1 v10 SQL server which was in house into Azure as a virtual Windows server. We plan to use Azure remote desktop for all the users to gain access. All users currently connect to a in house Windows Terminal server so hopefully the experience will be similar.

My question is regarding how to set up the Azure Remote Desktop. I have installed the SAP Client as well as the DI API app. My issue is we want to test it back to the live server, is it possible for the client which is on a non domain PC to connect to a domain server? There doesn't seem to be a way to make the authorisation across separate subnets and domains. Any advise / information on setting things up in Azure would be most welcome.

entry.title: SAP B1 - Prevent auto opening when saving document as excel
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any way to prevent the excel file that is generated when saving a report/document from SAP B1?

I have tried the suggestion of removing the AutoOpen file that is located in C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One\ExclDocs but that doesn't seem to work.

The files are not opening when saved as xls or csv but they are opening automatically when saved as xlsx.

Any advice would be appreciated.

Thank you,

Spyros

entry.title: Fetching UserName based on repeated item's InternalKey.
entry.content:
Hey!

I'm writing this question, because even after countless tries and workaraound attempts, I still couln't solve this issue. 

I am using ApprovalRequest1 data variable. My issue is, that I want to show the UserCode or UserName field for each approver who made a decision, but only the InternalKey of the users are present in the data. Since the text box is in repeat, I don't know how to fetch and store the data from Users endpoint for each line of the repeated data. My goal is to replace all potential repeated items' InternalKey with the matching User's UserCode or UserName.

I had troubles before working with sub-arrays, and this time too it gave me a troublesome time. Here are some images for easier understading (the on the second one we can see my best attempt so far.):
